title: Compass Plus
description: A fancy HUD for your compass.
body:
# Compass Plus

[![Requires Minecraft Forge](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Requires%20Minecraft%20Forge-26303d?logo=data:image/png;base64,&style=for-the-badge)](https://minecraftforge.net/) [![Discord Support Server](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Discord-5865f2?logoColor=white&logo=discord&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/3Awrc3EG7Y) [![Github Repository](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Github-black?logoColor=white&logo=github&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/ModdingPlus/CompassPlus)

## About

Compass Plus is a client-side mod that adds a fancy little compass HUD that shows the cardinal directions, the world spawn, lodestones, and the point of your last death depending on the compasses in your inventory.

![Screenshot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModdingPlus/CompassPlus/1.19.x/docs/screenshot.png)

## Planned Features

* (maybe) show the direction of treasure maps in your inventory
* compat with Quarks Compasses work Everywhere module
* basic settings
  * always show the overlay with cardinal directions, but not the world spawn
  * always show the world spawn even if no compasses are in your inventory
  * always show player spawn even if no recovery compasses are in your inventory
* a simple API for other mods to add their own POIs to the compass HUD
